raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad tee ne klautija / bet
apzeetinaiahs pahrqalwigi / pehz
fawu Tehwu Pahrgalwibas/
kas eekſch to KUNGU fawu
Deewn ne bij tizzeifscht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta nizzinaja tee winna
Baufkus/ un winna Derribu/ ko
21, tas ar winnu Tehwein bij dar-
rijs/ un winna Leezibas/ ko tas
winnu Starpa bij apleezinajs/
un dsinnahs us Neleetibu / un
ktua neleefschi/ un gahje teem Pa-
ganeem pakkat/ kas apkahrt teem
bija/ no ka tas KUNGS teem
bij paweblejs/ ka teem ne bij ta
darriht ka winni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir tee atstahjehs no wiſ-
feim Bantleem ta KUNGA fa-
wa Deewa / un darrija few is-
leetas Bildes/ Diwi Tekkus / un
darrija arridsan Elka Meschns /
un paklannitjahs preeksch wiſfu
Debbes Spehku / un kalpoja
Baalam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee likke arridsan fawus
Dehluß un fawas Meitas zaar
Ugguni eet/ un dewahs us Sih-
letchanahm/ un eezeentja Putnu-
Brehfschanu / un pahrdewahe
tann darriht preeksch ta KUN-
GA Azzim/ ka tee winnu ap-
kaitinaja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz apskaitahs tas
KUNGS tohti pahr Israelta/ ka
wiſsch tohs no few atmette/ ka
ne neeka atlifke/ ka ta Zilts Juh
da ween.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "(Ir Juhda ne turreja ta
KUNGA fawa Deewa Baaf-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad atmette tas KUN-
wiffu Israelta Dsimmumu / u
apbehdinaja tohs/ un dewe to-
teem Laupitajem Rohka / k
mebr wiſsch tohs no few bij a
mettis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo wiſsch noschkihre
fraetu no Dahvida Namuna/ i
tee darrija Jerobeamu Neeba-
Dehlu par Rehnizu/ un Jerob
ams nowehrse Israelu no t
KUNGA/ un darrija tohs
leeleem Grehkeem grehkoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta staigaja tee Israe-
Behrni eekſch witteem Jerobe-
ma Grehkeem/ ko tas bij darrije-
tee ne atstahjehs no teem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Teekans tas KUNG-
Israelu no fewis atmette/ itti
ka tas bij runnajs/ zaur wittee-
faweem Kalpeem teem Praue-
scheem. Ta tappe Israels no f
was Semmes aiswests us A-
riju/ lihds schodeen.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Rehnisch no Af-
rijas atwedde (Landis) no Bo-
beles/un no Kutäs/un no Atwa-
un no Eemata/ un no Sewa-
waim / un likke tohs dshwo-
eekſch Samarias Pilfsahteem
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad tee un tur fahzedsh-
woht/ un to KUNGU ne bibja-
jahs/ tad fuhtija tas KUNG-
Lau
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
